heading: Progress reports
label: 9564 Progress reports
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the European Energy Security and Diversification Act of 2019, and also as part of the Further Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2020, and not as part of the Countering Russian Influence in Europe and Eurasia Act of 2017 which comprises this chapter.

children.text: a description of the energy infrastructure projects the United States has identified for such assistance; and

children.label: A
children.text: a description of the role of the United States in the project, including in early-stage project support and late-stage project support;

children.label: B
children.text: the amount and form of any debt financing and insurance provided by the United States Government for the project;

children.label: C
children.text: the amount and form of any early-stage project support; and

children.label: D
children.text: an update on the progress made on the project as of the date of the report.
